question: How do I reset my password?
ground_truth: Go to login page, click 'Forgot Password', enter email, check for reset link in inbox, click link and enter new password

question: What is your refund policy?
ground_truth: 30-day money-back guarantee on all plans. Refund requests must be made within 30 days of purchase. Renewals cannot be refunded. Contact support with order ID.

question: How long does standard shipping take?
ground_truth: Standard shipping takes 5-7 business days and is free. Express shipping is 2-3 business days for $15. Overnight is 1 business day for $25.

question: Do you offer international shipping?
ground_truth: Yes, we ship to over 150 countries. International orders take 10-21 business days. Rates are calculated at checkout based on weight and destination.

question: What payment methods are accepted?
ground_truth: We accept credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express), debit cards, PayPal, and bank transfers for annual plans. All processed through Stripe.

question: How do I track my order?
ground_truth: Log in to account, go to Order History, click on the order, view tracking number and link. Tracking info appears within 24 hours of purchase.

question: What features come with the Starter plan?
ground_truth: Starter plan ($29/month) includes: up to 100 projects, basic analytics, 5 team members, and email support

question: Can I export my data?
ground_truth: Yes, go to Settings > Data & Privacy > Export My Data. Choose format (CSV, JSON, PDF). Export prepared within 24 hours with download link via email.

question: What integrations are supported?
ground_truth: Supported integrations include Zapier, Slack, GitHub, Google Workspace, Microsoft Teams, and Salesforce (enterprise only)

question: Can I change my email address?
ground_truth: Yes, go to Settings > Account > Change Email. Enter new email, confirm via links sent to both old and new email addresses.

question: What should I do if my order doesn't arrive?
ground_truth: Check tracking info, wait 2-3 additional business days, check with neighbors. Contact support with order ID and tracking number if still not received for investigation or reship.

question: How does the 30-day refund work?
ground_truth: Within 30 days of purchase, contact support with order ID and reason for refund. Full refund processed within 5 business days. Renewals not eligible.

question: What do I do if I get an 'Unauthorized' error?
ground_truth: This error means you're not logged in. Try logging out and logging back in. If persists, reset password or contact support.

question: Do you offer discounts for annual plans?
ground_truth: Yes, annual plans are 20% cheaper than monthly. For example: Monthly $29/month = $348/year, Annual $279/year (save $69). Volume discounts available.

question: How can a non-profit get a discount?
ground_truth: Non-profits get 50% off all plans. Contact sales at sales@example.com with proof of non-profit status (501(c)(3) letter or equivalent)

question: What happens when I upgrade my plan?
ground_truth: New features available immediately. Charged prorated amount for remainder of current cycle. Paid period extends by amount of credit.

question: Can I have multiple accounts?
ground_truth: Each person can have one active account per email. You can have separate accounts for different email addresses if needed.

question: What should I do if the app is running slowly?
ground_truth: Try: clear cache/cookies, use different browser, disable extensions, restart computer, check internet speed. If persists, try different device or contact support.

question: What are the security features?
ground_truth: All data encrypted in transit and at rest. GDPR, HIPAA, SOC 2 compliant. Role-based access control. Complete audit logs of all actions.

question: How do I set up an integration with Slack?
ground_truth: Go to Settings > Integrations > Slack. Authorize the Slack app with required permissions. Install with full permissions. Test notification delivery. Slack notifications now working.
